def positive_operation_lacks_single_stable_name_across_logs_metrics_and_traces():
    rule_id = "operation_lacks_single_stable_name_across_logs_metrics_and_traces"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag operations that are named inconsistently across observability surfaces."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
